textPlain: > AI systems exist to reinforce and strengthen existing structures of power and violence.Exactly. You can see that with the proliferation of chickenized reverse centaurs[1] in all kinds of jobs. Getting rid of the free-willed human in the loop is the aim now that bosses/stakeholders have seen the light.[1] https://pluralistic.net/2022/04/17/revenge-of-the-chickenize...
